message:
✨ Auto-enable demo mode for Helm installs (no OAuth/agent) (#2292)

* ✨ Auto-enable demo mode for Helm installs (no OAuth/agent)

When the console is deployed via Helm with no OAuth configured and no
kc-agent, auto-enable demo mode on first visit — same instant-dashboard
experience as console.kubestellar.io. This eliminates the login page
friction for the from-lens installation flow.

Changes:
- Always call refreshUser() on mount, even without a token
- When no token + no OAuth configured → auto-demo (skip login page)
- When demo token + backend up + no OAuth → stay in demo mode instead
  of redirecting to /auth/github for an unnecessary dev-user JWT
- login() now checks OAuth config: no OAuth → demo mode directly
- Start isLoading=true to prevent login page flash during OAuth check

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add try/catch to login() checkOAuthConfigured call

Defensive consistency: wrap checkOAuthConfigured() in try/catch in
login() to match the same pattern used in refreshUser(). Prevents
unhandled rejection if the function is ever refactored to throw.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
